summary: User request materialized and routed to local AI diagnostic package implementation.
v1.10 plan defines mode-complete diagnostics and performance setting outputs.
Attached qwen3.6:27b run reviewed; cold/warm split and VRAM critical headroom drove v1.10 design.

v1.10 package and quality evidence are ready for delivery.
